flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Albany Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Albany Technical College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.2k → $12.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Albany Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (34.1% vs 41.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Albany Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).
